sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77796" key="parablasthtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραβλαστ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n77796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inclined to put out offshoots</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:1:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:1:5:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:1:6:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6.5</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
